languages.text: {n}Шипение, коснувшееся вашего слуха, складывается в едва различимые слова чужих переговоров. Их источник — {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусина{/g}, спрятанная за окровавленным ухом павшей сестры {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Адепта Сороритас{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Шипение, коснувшееся вашего слуха, складывается в едва различимые слова чужих переговоров. Их источник — {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусина{/g}, спрятанная за окровавленным ухом падшей сестры {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Адепта Сороритас{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Шипение, коснувшееся вашего слуха, складывается в едва различимые слова чужих переговоров. Их источник — {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}вокс-бусина{/g}, спрятанная за окровавленным ухом павшей сестры {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Адепта Сороритас{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}传入你耳中的嘶嘶声逐渐汇聚成勉强可辨的音阵通讯话语。声音来自一枚{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}音阵珠{/g}，它被塞在一位阵亡{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}战斗修女{/g}血迹斑斑的耳后。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}传入你耳中的嘶嘶声逐渐汇聚成勉强可辨的音阵通讯话语。声音来自一枚{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}音阵珠{/g}，它被塞在一位阵亡{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}战斗修女{/g}血迹斑斑的耳后。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans le sifflement qui se fait entendre, vous parvenez tout juste à discerner les mots d'une transmission-vox. Les sons proviennent d'un {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g} toujours accroché à l'oreille ensanglantée d'une {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sœur de Bataille{/g} tombée au combat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans le sifflement qui se fait entendre, vous parvenez tout juste à discerner les mots d'une transmission-vox. Les sons proviennent d'un {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}communicateur{/g} toujours accroché à l'oreille ensanglantée d'une {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sœur de Bataille{/g} tombée au combat.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kulaklarına ulaşan tıslama, bir voks iletiminin zar zor seçilebilen sözcüklerine dönüşüyor. Sesin kaynağı, yere düşmüş bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Harp Rahibesi'nin{/g} kanlı kulağının arkasına sıkıştırılmış bir {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}voks telsizi{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kulaklarına ulaşan tıslama, bir voks iletiminin zar zor seçilebilen sözcüklerine dönüşüyor. Sesin kaynağı, yere düşmüş bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Harp Rahibesi'nin{/g} kanlı kulağının arkasına sıkıştırılmış bir {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}voks telsizi{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El siseo que llega a tus oídos se transforma en las apenas comprensibles palabras de una transmisión de voco. Su origen está en una {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de voco{/g}, situada tras la ensangrentada oreja de una {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Hermana de Batalla{/g} caída.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El siseo que llega a tus oídos se transforma en las apenas comprensibles palabras de una transmisión de voco. Su origen está en una {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}cuenta de voco{/g}, situada tras la ensangrentada oreja de una {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Hermana de Batalla{/g} caída.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Zischen, das deine Ohren erreicht, verschmilzt mit den kaum verständlichen Worten einer Voxübertragung. Der Ursprung des Geräuschs ist ein {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Komm-Stecker{/g} hinter dem blutigen Ohr einer gefallenen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sororitas{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Zischen, das deine Ohren erreicht, verschmilzt mit den kaum verständlichen Worten einer Voxübertragung. Der Ursprung des Geräuschs ist ein {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}Komm-Stecker{/g} hinter dem blutigen Ohr einer gefallenen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sororitas{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}耳に届くヒスが合わさって、ヴォックス通信の言葉がかすかに聞こえてくる。その音源は、倒れた{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}バトルシスター{/g}の血まみれの耳の後ろに隠された{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}ヴォックス・ビード{/g}である。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hissing that reaches your ears coalesces into the barely discernible words of a vox-transmission. The source of the sound is a {g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}vox-bead{/g}, tucked behind the bloody ear of a fallen {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}Sister of Battle{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}耳に届くヒスが合わさって、ヴォックス通信の言葉がかすかに聞こえてくる。その音源は、倒れた{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptaSororitas}バトルシスター{/g}の血まみれの耳の後ろに隠された{g|Encyclopedia:CommBead}ヴォックス・ビード{/g}である。{/n}
